titleStmt.title: SII 15.228: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 228. (A.R. No. 429 of 1926.) AMMINBHĀVI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Mallikārjuna temple.

This is dated the 17th regnal year of the king, Śukla, Pushya-puṇṇame, Sunday, lunar eclipse. The date is irregular. In the year Śukla falling in the reign period of the king, the said tithi would correspond to 1149 A.D., December 16 which was Friday. Lunar eclipse did not occur on this day. This date would show that his first regnal year was counted from 1133 A.D., falling within the reign period of his father. The king is stated as ruling over the provinces of Gōve, Koṅkaṇa, Sēvurige-nāḍu and Halasige-nāḍu.

It registers a gift of land and two houses made in favour of the god Mallikārjuna and two maṭhas by Māḍa Boppaṇa. The donor is said to have purchased the gift property from the lords of Beḷavāḍigēri which formed part of Ammanabāvi, an agrahāra under the administration of Four Hundred Mahājanas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

bhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .

de rājyageyyuvājīyane kādaṁbānvayaṁ sivacitta
vīrapa¨rmmanripāḷaṁ gōveyumaṁ koṁkaṇamaṁ sēvurigenā
ḍanalli halasiganāḍaṁ kāva pratipāḷisuvaṁ śrīvīrape¨rmma
bhūpanī sivacittaṁ . śrīnāthaṁ sivacittamahīnātha vīrape¨rmmanāḷke
yoḷi¨rppudu nānū¨rvvaragrahāraṁ sthānamadameyanabāvi jagadoḷsēvya . ©
śrīmadammanabāviyoḷumesahitaṁ tridasasahitaṁ nelesidanoppe śrīmaṁnānū
¨rvvaruma śrīmūlasthāna śaṁbhu rakṣisaleṁmaṁ mānigaḷanātha ddānigaḷakaḷaṁkacarita
rāśritasulabha¨rnnānū¨rvva¨rddēvabhakta¨rmmaunānuṣṭhāṇaśīlaguṇasaṁpannaru . Alli be
ḷavāḍigēriya vallabharige pādapojeyaṁ boppaṇanittalliye keyyaṁ paḍedaṁ sallalita� malli
kā¨rjunēśaṁgeṁdu beḷavāḍigēriya nū¨rvva¨rbbaḷavanta¨rppū¨rvagōle mata¨rmmū� beḷavaḍigēri
ya śatadā sthaḷadoḷaga goravuṁbolana sīmeyiṁ paḍuvalu moṟaḍi
yiṁ baḍagalu Antu pā¨rvagōla matta¨rmūṟaṁ sa¨rvvanamāsyavāgi biṭṭaṁ mu
dadiṁ . maneyeraḍaṟa nelasaṇamaṁ vinaya parabrahmaṇōttamannanū
¨rvvaroḷanunayadiṁ paḍedaṁ boppanu sa¨rbbanamasyavāgi maṭhaveraḍakkaṁ .
© 17 neya śukrasaṁvaccharada pusya puṁṇame Ādivāradaṁdu sō
magrahaṇamāge tatpuṇyadinadoḷu Ā mattaru mūṟaṁ Ā maṭha
veraḍaṁ māḍa boppaṇaṁ koṭṭa triṇeyana caitra pavitrada gaṇapū
jege caṁdratāreyuḷḷaṁnnevara . Intallama naṁ śrī mallikā
[¨rjjunē]śaṁgittaṁ bhrāntilladavana baṇṇisa śāṁtātmaṁ māḍa boppaṇaṁ kritakritya .
māḍa boppaṇana dēvaranāḍaṁbaremāgi pūji pācā¨ryana bē
dante paḍedaṁnnōḍintī yamritarāśipaṇḍita vibhuva .
na dayeyiṁda paḍedaṁ taḷavillade māḍa boppanīśasthānakkoḍeya
doppaṁbaḍedintī yamritarāśipaṇḍitadēvaru . boppaṇana mallināthaṁ
ppaṁ baḍedippa ṭhāvinācā¨ryyatvavana¨rppisalu boppaṇa vīra
rugaḷa śiṣyaru . sēṇigarellaṁ maduveya ṭhāṇado
damaged
triṇeyana caitrapavitrada gaṇapu jege caṁdratāreyuḷḷana
. Ī dha¨rmmamanārō¨rvva
¨rpparama śukhamaṁ [. ©]
gaṇapatyāyanamaḥ .
